Mtn To Have Judgment Deemed Satisfied
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: SCOTT SEABAUGH, ESQ., 418.298.6647, FOR PLAINTIFF CAMILLE RUJA.
CHRIS PATTON, ESQ., 510.835.3400, FOR DEFENDANT ERIC CHRISTENSEN.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs ERIC CHRISTENSEN and ANN CHRISTENSEN's Motion To Have Judgment Deemed Satisfied is granted. The clerk shall enter a satisfaction of judgment per CCP 724.050(d)(2). The Court awards defendant $860 as reasonable fees to be reimbursed by plaintiff or her attorney. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Mtn To Have Judgment Deemed Satisfied
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Continued To Oct-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ERIC CHRISTENSEN and ANN CHRISTENSEN'S Motion To Have Judgment Deemed Satisfied is continued to October 8, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the opposing party a chance to comply with SF Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of the opposition by September 26, 2013, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
